reviews.review_description:
What a brilliant little game. 
Great to chill out slamming some blocks down.
Should be in everyone’s library.

Fantastic!!
This game is exactly what I wanted!  The mixed reality  is so cool.  Looks great, and a blast to play 🫠👍
Right off it looks beautiful. Then it took me a little while to get an idea of the sort of strategy required to play well. (It’s not just Tetris.) Once I did, I loved it.

This brings me back to playing Tetris on my Gameboy.
Twistex is a brilliant block game made for VR. It is sort of like a cross between Tetris and a Rubik's Cube. You will be spinning a cylinder in mix reality as blocks start to fall down. Complete a ring to break the blocks. The controls are easy to learn and feel very natural. The music is relaxing and the gameplay is addictive, keeping you focused and zoned into the game. Playing this in mix reality allows you to enjoy the game well still being aware of your surroundings, this will be a hit on the new Quest 3. I spent hours playing the game and watching TV at the same time. 
If you enjoy puzzle games and want to experience the world of mix reality, this is a perfect title for you.

Amazing puzzle game! It had me sucked in immediately! 

It’s actually very therapeutic, but don’t be fooled as it’s not as easy as it looks! 

Just loving the challenge! The physics are great, so many ways to master this game! But I’ll let you figure that out for yourselves 😜

The replay ability is very high! You will be coming back to it for sure! It’s definitely one for you Quest Library 📚 

Really great puzzle game.

Been playing for a while now it’s so addictive and well worth the purchase my kids also love it!! 🥰
I am enjoying this game, but would like to change the colors and environment of the pass-through, how do I do that? Thanks.

developer_response.body: Hey jkul777. Glad you're enjoying it. You will unlock new environments, colors and decals by clearing levels. Then customise them from the main menu.
